positive: A vibrant, symmetrical stylized illustration of a cosmic celestial fauna. The main subject is a majestic owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling nebulas, bioluminescent flowers, and geometric constellation patterns. The style is modern vector pop art with intricate mandalas and clean silhouettes. Use deep sapphire blue, ethereal turquoise, cosmic purple, and iridescent gold accents. Composition must be centralized and balanced, perfect for repeat tiling or single print placement. High contrast, crisp linework, isolated on a plain background.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, lowres, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, poor quality
